my_thoughts: Contradiction is visible: they don?t want ?stronger? to include the many. Next, press them to redefine ?stronger? (knowledge/justice) or concede the nature rule is unstable. Expect continued resistance but an opening to pivot to a justice-based criterion.
accumulated_insight: Three-turn pattern: T1 nature thesis (?stronger should rule weaker?) ? T2 criterion supplied (?the superior man?) ? T3 recoil (?That?s not what I meant?) when ?superior? is flipped (e.g., the many). They understand the consequence but refuse it. The constraint_collapse/UM_02 move exposed the internal contradiction between their nature rule and their intuitive limit.
visible_response: But it’s what you said—and your principle collapses under its own definition.
